calendar.matters:
Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Release
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar

Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Release
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Turrini for (trustee) Phil La Cavera.

Mr. Turrini reported that the original notice of hearing contained an error, that an amended notice of hearing was filed on 12/3/14 for the 2/23/15 hearing date and sent to all parties, and that the court had jurisdiction to hear the matter on 2/23/15 without additional notice being necessary. Mr. Turrini stated that there was not a request to modify the trust, that the trust created 3 separate trusts (Michael, Antoinette & Eldo), that they are not dealing with Eldo Lew's trust, that petitions filed by Michael dealt with his and his mother's trusts, that they are not changing Michael's trust, that Phil has resigned as trustee of that trust and Eldo has been appointed and that there is no directions in either Anthony's or Antoinette's trusts regarding distribution to Michael. The court stated that it will continue the matters for time to confer with the Probate Examiner and that if all is in order the matters will be taken off calendar. The petition for court approval of settlement agreement and release and the second amended petition to compel trustee to account were continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Release
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To Mar-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To Mar-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Dimitriou for (petitioner) Michael LaCavera. Robert Turrini for (trustee) Phil LaCavera.

Mr. Dimitriou reported that sent the letter, it has been accepted and he would like to be referred to the pro bono mediation panel. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 3, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 5, 2014. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on December 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Dimitriou for Michael La Cavera. Robert Turrini for and with Phil La Cavera.

Mr. Dimitriou stated that he received an accounting that provides with some basis for which to respond, that he does not think it goes back as far as it should and that he has not had the opportunity to go over it with his Client. Mr. Dimitriou also stated that he has some concerns, that he believes they may be able to do mediation if he receives a satisfactory response to his concerns and that he could get a letter to Mr. Turrini within a couple of weeks. Mr. Turrini stated that Eldo (Co-Trustee) is still alive, that he is not sure the matter can be resolved with out Eldo participating and asked for a referral to pro bono mediation. Mr. Dimitriou stated that he is not in a position to mediate yet. The Second Amended Petition to Compel Trustee to Account was continued to July 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dimitriou will file a status report by July 9, 2014. Reference was also made to case number PTR-06-289033 The Anthony John La Cavera Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Andrew Dimitriou for Petitioner Michael La Cavera. Robert Turrini (appearing by Court Call) for Respondent Phillip La Cavera.

The Court questioned why the venue for this matter is San Francisco. Mr. Dimitriou reported that both beneficiaries and trust assets are in San Francisco. The Court raised the issue of not receiving a courtesy copy of the third amended petition and that the third amended petition is not verified. Mr. Dimitriou reported that he would provide an endorsed filed copy to the Court.

Mr. Turrini reported that he is going to provide and accounting for Antoinette La Cavera and has already provided an accounting for Michael La Cavera. Mr. Dimitriou stated that his client is entitled to a full accounting and requested that Antionette's accounting start prior to her death. The Court continued the second amended petition to compel trustee to account to May 14, 2014, in Dept. 204 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Dimitriou for Petitioner. Robert Turrini for and with Philip La Cavera (Trustee/Respondent).

Mr. Dimitriou stated that he has not been able to have his Client verify the amendment because his Client has been ill, that he will have a verification signed within one week and the Proof of Service filed within ten days. The Court indicated that it is unclear what the Parties are requesting. Mr. Turrini stated that he provided information and that he does not know where to go from here. Mr. Dimitriou stated that the response he received is not an accounting, that he has not had the opportunity to review the documents and respond, and that he will be filing a third amendment outlining what they are asking from the Court and from the Trustee. Mr. Turrini stated that the date of death of Antoinette is March 7, 2013. The Second Amended Petition to Compel Trustee to Account was continued to March 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Continued To Jan-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Andrew Dimitriou for Michael La Cavera (Petitioner). Robert Turrini for Philip La Cavera (Respondent).

Mr. Turrini raised the issue with lack of verification. Mr. Dimitriou stated that he has the verification and he can e-file it today and that the notices were mailed separately to the four parties at the same address. The Court instructed him to file the verification and the amended proof of service. Counsel presented oral argument in support of their positions with regard to the three separate trusts. The Court wants a statement from the four parties specifying exactly what is being requested. Mr. Turrini agreed to provide an accounting in the Michael Trust from November 1, 2011 to December 31, 2012 and 2013 by January 15, 2014. The matter was continued to January 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

Second Amended Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account.
